name: Wix Stores
description: Connect your Wix Stores site to look up orders, read transactions and fulfilment, issue refunds, and browse your catalog

search_orders.label: Search orders
search_orders.description: Find orders by number, buyer email, status or date to resolve an order ID.

get_order.label: Get order
get_order.description: Get a full order by ID, including items, totals, payment and fulfilment status.

get_order_transactions.label: Get order transactions
get_order_transactions.description: List every payment and refund on an order, with transaction IDs and amounts.

get_order_refundability.label: Check refundability
get_order_refundability.description: Check whether each payment can be refunded via the Wix API before refunding.

refund_order.label: Refund order
refund_order.description: Issue a full or partial refund, or record an external refund when the provider can't be refunded via API.

get_order_fulfillments.label: Get order fulfilments
get_order_fulfillments.description: List an order's fulfilments — shipped items and tracking info.

create_fulfillment.label: Create fulfilment
create_fulfillment.description: Mark order items as shipped, optionally with carrier and tracking number.

update_fulfillment.label: Update fulfilment
update_fulfillment.description: Update an existing fulfilment's tracking information.

delete_fulfillment.label: Delete fulfilment
delete_fulfillment.description: Remove a fulfilment from an order, reverting its items to not-fulfilled.

search_products.label: Search products
search_products.description: Search the catalog by text or filter to find products.

get_product.label: Get product
get_product.description: Get a product by ID, including variants, pricing and inventory.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Wix API key from Settings → API Keys, scoped to Orders (read & manage), Order Billing (refunds), Order Fulfillments (manage) and Catalog (read). Treated as a secret.

siteId.label: Site ID
siteId.description: The Wix site ID this key is scoped to (from your dashboard URL or the Query Sites API).
